sid.description: The unique string identifying the Message resource.

account_sid.description: The SID of the Account that sent the message.

messaging_service_sid.description: The SID of the Messaging Service used, if any.

body.description: The text content of the message.

num_segments.description: The number of segments that make up the complete message.

num_media.description: The number of media files associated with the message.

from.description: The sender's phone number, alphanumeric sender ID, short code, or channel address.

to.description: The recipient's phone number or channel address.

date_created.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) of when the resource was created.

date_updated.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) of when the resource was last updated.

date_sent.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) of when the message was sent.

error_code.description: The error code if the message status is failed or undelivered.

error_message.description: The description of the error_code, if any.

price.description: The amount billed for the message in the currency specified by price_unit.

price_unit.description: The currency the price is measured in (ISO 4217).

api_version.description: The API version used to process the message.

uri.description: The URI of the resource relative to https://api.twilio.com.

subresource_uris.description: A map of related subresources (e.g. media, feedback).
